name: Cohesity DataProtect
description: Integrates with Cohesity DataProtect REST API for protection job management, backup run monitoring, source registration, and restore operations across hybrid and multi-cloud environments

actions.name: List Protection Jobs
actions.description: Retrieve all protection jobs with their configuration, schedule, and current status

parameters.name: names
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of job names to filter by

parameters.name: environments
parameters.description: Filter by environment type (kVMware, kPhysical, kSQL, kOracle, kAWS, kAzure)

actions.name: List Protection Runs
actions.description: Retrieve backup run history for a specific protection job showing run status, duration, and data transferred

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: Filter runs by protection job ID

parameters.name: startedTimeUsecs
parameters.description: Filter runs started after this time (microseconds since epoch)

parameters.name: numRuns
parameters.description: Maximum number of runs to return

parameters.name: runTypes
parameters.description: Filter by run type (kRegular, kFull, kLog, kSystem)

actions.name: List Protection Sources
actions.description: Retrieve all registered protection sources (VMs, physical servers, databases, cloud instances)

parameters.name: environments
parameters.description: Filter by environment type (kVMware, kPhysical, kSQL, kOracle, kAWS)

actions.name: Trigger Backup Run
actions.description: Initiate an immediate backup run for a specified protection job

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the protection job to run

parameters.name: runType
parameters.description: Type of backup run (kRegular, kFull, kLog)

actions.name: List Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve system alerts including backup failures, capacity warnings, and security notifications

parameters.name: alertCategoryList
parameters.description: Filter by alert category (kDisk, kNode, kCluster, kNodeHealth, kClusterHealth, kBackupRestore)

parameters.name: maxAlerts
parameters.description: Maximum number of alerts to return

actions.name: Get Cluster Info
actions.description: Retrieve Cohesity cluster information including health status, capacity, and node details
